name: Mondel Bread (Almond Loaf)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together in a medium bowl for 4 to 5 minutes or until well mixed and thick dough-like consistency.
2. Form into three logs and sprinkle with a light mixture of cinnamon and sugar, if desired.
3. Place the logs on greased cookie sheets.
4. Bake at 325°F for 15 minutes.
5. Remove from oven and slice into half-inch pieces.
6. Return to oven for another 15 minutes or bake for a total of 30 minutes until cooled. The inside will be soft.
7. This recipe freezes well.
